title: SDM Shop Pay
description: adds a simple mechanics for SDM Shop, when killing any mob will be credited currency
body: Adds a simple mechanics for SDM Shop, when killing any mob will be credited currency. Depending on the health of the entity will give a certain amount from 1 to 2 (if the health is 20 hearts or less) and from 3 to 5 (if the health is more than 20 hearts). And there's 15 bucks for killing a player.
